name: 格洛克18型 | 一目了然
nameZh: 格洛克18型 | 一目了然
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been painted with a tan slide and blue trigger. The frame is made of a clear polymer. What you see is what you get
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 这把武器用棕褐色喷绘了手枪套筒，蓝色喷绘了扳机。枪身用透明聚合物制成。 所见即所得
